scoringPlays.text: Joseph Manjack IV 3 Yd pass from Josh Hoover (Nate McCashland Kick)
Eric McAlister 17 Yd pass from Josh Hoover (Nate McCashland Kick)
Evan Pryor 26 Yd pass from Brendan Sorsby (Stephen Rusnak Kick)
Jordan Dwyer 69 Yd pass from Josh Hoover (Nate McCashland Kick)
Jeff Caldwell 14 Yd pass from Brendan Sorsby (Stephen Rusnak Kick)
Jeremy Payne 9 Yd Run (Nate McCashland Kick)
Joseph Manjack IV 44 Yd Pass from Josh Hoover, fumbled, Jordan Dwyer recovered  in end zone (Nate McCashland Kick)
Cyrus Allen 35 Yd pass from Brendan Sorsby (Two-Point Pass Conversion Failed)
Jeremy Payne 51 Yd Run (Nate McCashland Kick)

videos.headline: Joseph Manjack scores first TD for TCU
videos.description: Josh Hoover connects with Joseph Manjack in the end zone for a 3-yard touchdown for the Horned Frogs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joseph Manjack scores first TD for TCU) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Eric McAlister holds onto the ball for a TD
videos.description: Josh Hoover throws it to Eric McAlister, who juggles it in the end zone to score a touchdown for TCU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Eric McAlister holds onto the ball for a TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Dwyer Mosses defender on 69-yard TCU TD
videos.description: Josh Hoover sends a deep ball to Jordan Dwyer and he makes a tough catch to score a 69-yard touchdown for TCU against Cincinnati.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Dwyer Mosses defender on 69-yard TCU TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeremy Payne runs to the edge for a TCU TD
videos.description: Jeremy Payne rushes 9 yards to the end zone as the Horned Frogs pile it on vs. the Bearcats.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremy Payne runs to the edge for a TCU TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
